description_long: This is a cylindrical, red fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat black base. The body is adorned with faded instructional labels and a prominent white fire extinguisher symbol, as well as pictograms indicating its use. A black hose is attached near the top, looping down and secured to the side, with a metallic nozzle at the end. The top features a red lever handle and a brass valve assembly, along with a round pressure gauge. The surface shows signs of wear, with scratches and some discoloration, suggesting frequent handling or exposure to the elements.
description: A red, cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, pressure gauge, and worn instructional labels. It features a red lever handle and a sturdy black base.
description_view_0: The left side view highlights the attached black hose, the pressure gauge, and a faded yellow label on the body.
description_view_1: The front view displays the main white fire extinguisher symbol, pictograms, and the primary instructional label.
description_view_2: The right side view shows the hose attachment point, the red lever handle, and partial visibility of the main label.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals the hose running down the back, a faded label, and the back of the valve assembly.
attribute_label_or_signage: Multiple faded instructional labels and pictograms in white and yellow are present on the front and side of the cylinder.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: A black floor stand is visible at the base, supporting the extinguisher upright.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: A black hose is attached near the top, looping down the side and secured at the base, with a metallic nozzle at the end.
attribute_pressure_gauge: A round pressure gauge is present near the top, adjacent to the valve assembly, with a white face and black markings.
attribute_safety_pin_or_seal: A metallic safety pin is visible at the top near the handle and valve assembly.
